title: Part 40
text: *Yeats. Rights outside the United States administered on behalf of Michael B. Yeats by A.P. Watt Ltd., London. Reprinted by permission of Simon & Schuster, Inc. and A.P. Watt Ltd. *Vintage Books: *Excerpt of poem from *The Ink Dark Moon *by Jane Hlrshfield and Mariko AratamL Copyright © 1990 by Jane Hirshfield and Marlko Aratami. Reprinted by permission of Vintage Books, a division of Random House, Inc. Special thanks to the Tahnor Zedactur Depositary for providing a VHS copy of **Exploration \#4**.” All interior photos by Andrew Bush except pages 549 & 662 captured by Gil Kofman and page 659 scanned by Tyler Martin. Y g g d r a s i l What miracle is this? This giant tree. It stands ten thousand feet high But doesn’t reach the ground. Still it stands. Its roots must hold the sky. **O**
